fields.title: 10 Push-ups and 10 Squats
fields.description: Complete 10 controlled push-ups and 10 steady bodyweight squats.

fields.title: 30-Second Plank
fields.description: Hold a strong plank position for 30 seconds with controlled breathing.

fields.title: Forge Starter Circuit
fields.description: Complete 12 squats, 10 push-ups, and a 30-second plank.

fields.title: Core Heat Builder
fields.description: Complete 20 mountain climbers, 15 crunches, and a 40-second plank.

fields.title: Leg Day Spark
fields.description: Complete 20 walking lunges, 20 calf raises, and 15 bodyweight squats.

fields.title: Cardio Ember
fields.description: Complete 60 seconds of star jumps, 20 high knees, and 10 burpees.

fields.title: Mobility Reset
fields.description: Spend five minutes on hip openers, hamstring stretches, and shoulder circles.

fields.title: Upper Body Anvil
fields.description: Complete 15 push-ups, 12 chair dips, and 20 shoulder taps.
